metadata.description: Custom Claude Code skills for finance, data visualization, and AI image generation. Tuned for investment research and enterprise-grade output.

plugins.name: nano-banana
plugins.description: AI image generation using Gemini 3.1 Flash, tuned for finance and investment research. Produces enterprise-grade infographics with white backgrounds, restrained typography, and clean minimalist aesthetics suitable for research PDFs and board presentations.

plugins.name: investment-analyst
plugins.description: End-to-end investment credit analysis pipeline. Automates research provider access (JPM, CapitalIQ, Fitch, CreditSights, Morgan Stanley), document collection, fundamental research with FRED macro data, 7-sheet Excel financial models with credit scoring, D3 charts, nano-banana infographics, and DOCX report generation with SBC Treasury branding.

plugins.name: bloomberg-bql
plugins.description: Bloomberg Query Language (BQL) skill for retrieving financial data across equities, fixed income, portfolios, funds, CDS, and MBS using polars-bloomberg (BQuery) in Python. Covers BQL syntax, universe functions, data items, screening, time series, grouping, and custom analytics.

plugins.name: bloomberg
plugins.description: Comprehensive Bloomberg Python toolkit — BQL data retrieval, factor analysis, visualization, and portfolio construction using polars-bloomberg, bql, bqfactor, bqviz, and bqapi in the bqnt-3 conda environment.

plugins.name: charting-skill
plugins.description: Chart.js and Canvas-based charting templates — bar charts, time series, dumbbell charts, and heatmaps with pre-built HTML templates and D3 pattern references.

plugins.name: mmf-analytics
plugins.description: Money Market Fund analytics with charts and monthly meeting presentation for FRGXX, GOFXX, MVRXX, BGSXX.

plugins.name: sbc-pool-report
plugins.description: Generate publication-quality monthly investment pool reports for the San Bernardino County Treasurer's $16B portfolio. Features parallel sub-agent execution, rich economic storytelling with trend charts, and branded PowerPoint presentations with live data from Azure SQL, FRED, and web research.

plugins.name: sbc-statement-reconciler
plugins.description: Automate bank statement reconciliation for San Bernardino County Treasury. Parse Wells Fargo and Bank of America statements, OCR HTTP documents, reconcile transactions, generate Excel reports, and review results with AI.
